news.headline: Seven injured as driver in Italian city runs over pedestrians
news.summary:
<p>A driver injured seven people, four of them badly, when he drove on a sidewalk in the northern Italian city of Modena on Saturday and then got out possibly holding a knife, the mayor said.</p>

news.headline: Minister chalks up CSS failure rate to lack of preparation, competitive nature of exam
news.summary:
